phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la taquilla?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Al fondo del vestíbulo, a la izquierda.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo dejar el equipaje?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh deh-HAR el eh-kee-PAH-heh?

likely_response.translation_en: In the locker room, ground floor.

responses.english: In the locker room, ground floor.

likely_response.local: Andén 1, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahn-DÉN AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Check the screens, usually platform one.

responses.english: Check the screens, usually platform one.
responses.phonetic: ahn-DÉN AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Andén 1, al fondo a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿me podría decir dónde está la parada de taxis?
phrases.pronunciation: Per-DOHN, meh poh-DREE-ah deh-SEER DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah pah-RAH-dah deh TAHK-sees?

likely_response.local: Salida principal, fuera a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL foo-EH-rah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Main exit, outside on the right.

responses.english: Main exit, outside on the right.
responses.phonetic: sah-LEE-dah preen-thee-PAHL foo-EH-rah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Salida principal, fuera a la derecha.
